properties.displayName: Fortigate - ログイン ブルートフォース攻撃の検出
properties.description: Fortigate デバイスへの認証失敗が短時間に多数発生した場合にアラートを生成します。VPN ログインやファイアウォール管理画面へのブルートフォース攻撃の兆候を検出します。
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"
| where DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where Activity has_any ("login", "authentication", "auth")
| where DeviceAction has_any ("failure", "failed", "denied", "invalid")
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated),
    TargetAccounts = make_set(DestinationUserName, 10),
    TargetDevices = make_set(DeviceName, 5)
    by SourceIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailedAttempts >= 10
| extend TimeDiffMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', LastAttempt, FirstAttempt)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    FailedAttempts,
    FirstAttempt,
    LastAttempt,
    TimeDiffMinutes,
    TargetAccounts,
    TargetDevices
